Name:
??? [V1]
(feat. JAY-Z) (prod. DJ Silk)
(Talking To My Diary)
Notes:
The beat that ended up being used for "Talking to My Diary" was originally meant for a JAY-Z and Dr. Dre collaboration, with writing by Snoop Dogg, most likely done during Kingdom Come sessions.

Quote from DJ Silk:
"Snoop picked the record to write to that I literally did for JAY-Z and Dre. And that ended up being a song called "Talking to My Diary" that's on the Compton soundtrack."

This entry from an older Dre tracker was actually a misunderstanding from what DJ Silk said as Jay did write for the song, however only in 2010, and not any time before.

Name:
The Game - One Blood [V1]
(prod. Dr. Dre)
(Murder Dem Murderers)
Notes: A common fake leak is Game's vocals from "One Blood" on the Murder Dem Murderers beat. It is a common misconception that this remix is a legit original version leak of One Blood. There is a fake instrumental upload of Murder Dem Murderers with the title "One Blood Original (Instrumental)" which also helps fuel the misinformation.

Notes: A snippet of a song called Crack A Bottle Pt. 2 was leaked by Navjosh in early July 2009, and according to him it had Em, 50 and 2 other unknown artists on it (unknown due to being a 9 second snippet). The snippet is lost as of currently, and Navjosh wasn't able to obtain the full song. The snippet was later debunked, and the other 2 artists was likely referring to Ca$his and Bobby Creekwater from the remix.

Name:
Untitled
(prod. Dr. Dre)
(Validation And Promise, Real Good, Get It)
Notes:
OG Filename: 2013 for candice - ruff candice
When the song was just a snippet it was said that this was a Dre produced song however, the presence of Candice Pillay on this track means it is solo Dem Jointz production only, with no Dre involvement as he only knew of Candice during the Compton sessions. Was  also thought to be a throwaway from good kid, m.A.A.d city, but iTunes metadata reveals that it was made around February 2013, meaning it was "Tu Pimp A Caterpillar [V1]" era. Leaked in full on January 19th, 2026 and was still said to be Dre production despite people saying it wasnt. This is a completely real song, it's just Dre is not involved.

Name:
3 Headed Monster 
(with Eminem, Dr. Dre, Denaun & ???)
Notes: Was either for Bodied or Kamikaze. Has Denaun on the hook, Dre on verse 2 & Eminem on verse 3. Unknown who's verse 1 but it's thought to be 50 Cent. Had a music video shot at the Empire State Building as well. Confirmed fake as this song started from a false rumor that misunderstood what the director of the Venom music video said.

Name: 3 Headed Monster [Music Video]
Notes: A music video was apparently shot at the Empire State Building.

Name:
More
(feat. Nas, Sly Pyper & MassV) (prod. Phonix Beats)
Notes: Fake track made by MassV, however, the beat is real. Nas' verse is seemingly AI based on the snippet of his collaboration with Dre around this time which reuses his lyrics from "Heart Sweepers". It seems the recording was ran through an AI model, and MassV added some lyrics at the end of the verse also. The hook also is seemingly AI, the only real vocals on the song is MassV's verse, likely not recorded in Detox sessions. No Dre vocals. Has some of the worst mixing ever. May god help us all.

Name:

Notes: AI song made by former Dre associate MassV, with no involvement from Dre whatsoever. Was put onto his "Detox" leak album which had real Detox songs on it.
